sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ الْمَدِينَةَ الْقَدِيمَةَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِي بِالْأَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam sa prijateljima posjetio stari grad.
sentences.translationEn: I visited the old city with my friends yesterday.

sentences.arabic: مَشَيْنَا فِي الشَّوَارِعِ الضَّيِّقَةِ وَشَاهَدْنَا الْمَبَانِيَ التَّارِيخِيَّةَ الْجَمِيلَةَ.
sentences.translation: Šetali smo uskim ulicama i razgledali lijepe historijske građevine.
sentences.translationEn: We walked through the narrow streets and saw the beautiful historical buildings.

sentences.arabic: اِشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ مِنَ السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam nekoliko suvenira na narodnoj pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: I bought some souvenirs from the traditional market.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلْنَا الْغَدَاءَ فِي مَطْعَمٍ تَقْلِيدِيٍّ مَشْهُورٍ.
sentences.translation: Ručali smo u poznatom tradicionalnom restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: We had lunch in a famous traditional restaurant.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذاً جِدّاً وَالْجَوُّ رَائِعاً.
sentences.translation: Hrana je bila veoma ukusna, a atmosfera predivna.
sentences.translationEn: The food was very delicious and the atmosphere was wonderful.
